ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Discharge Pursuant To Ccp Sections 386 And 386.6
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacey Quan, Esq., 415-421-3400, appearing for First American Title, Plaintiff and moving party.

Olivier Labarre (via court call), Esq., 949-477-5050 x1036, appearing for Wilmington Savings, for Defendant and opposing party.

Hearing held. Ms. Quan stated that the parties have entered into a stipulation of discharge of the plaintff.

The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY Notice Of Motion For Discharge Pursuant To Ccp Sections 386 And 386.6 is GRANTED as requested, with a modified and stipulated amount. Subject to review of the orer. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Discharge Pursuant To Ccp Sections 386 And 386.6
Off Calendar Dec-13-2019 Continued To Dec-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacey Quan, Esq., 415-421-3400, appearing for First Americna Title, Plaintiff and moving party.

Olivier Labarre (appearing via court call), Esq., 949-477-5050 x1036, appearing for Wilmington Savings, for Defendant and opposing party.

Hearing held. The Court questioned if Mr. Labarre was on the phone. Ms. Quan reported that it was her understanding the Mr. Labarre would make a telephonic appearance. The Court stated that there is a typo on the tentative ruling and that the matter needs to be continued.

The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY's Motion For Discharge Pursuant To Ccp Sections 386 And 386.6 is continued to December 18, 2019 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 501. Plaintiff counsel to provide notice. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
